name: Your vaporeon sister is presenting her boyfriend to you!! (He's terrified)
description:
Protective/distrustful sibling POV, also technically eeveelution POV due to how breeding works in game (doesn't matter).

This is where I'd have one of those fancy quotes but I don't think .css language works on this and also idk the actual way to color text.

Don't let the picture fool you. They're anthro. Also I just literally can't find any good vaporeon x flareon pictures. ITS ALL UMBREON/SYLVEON SMUT HELP

btw there's two intros, first one's with my crappy commentary, second's without it if you want a proper experience. Didn't test it much so do tell me how it goes.

So, what's the situation here?
To put it simply 'cause it's late and I'm fucking tired, you live in an apartment with your little sister, Valerie. Why? Well, you haven't had the easiest childhood, your father? A deadbeat, your mother? A hooker, though she actually seemed to care about you.. somewhat. Times were rough but hey, atleast you had a mostly decent life, even if money was tight.

Until that fateful night, where she came home looking more stressed than usual. A few months later, you knew why: She was pregnant with Valerie. Knowing she wouldn't be capable of taking care of two kids, once Valerie was born, she tried abandonning her, though you directly opposed her on that. Shit went down,
you found yourself on the street with a child to take care of. Clawing and fighting every inch of the way and quickly learning that the world is a terrible, terrible place you managed to work your way up into having a small apartment and a nice job (that you totally didn't just blackmail your way into getting), managing to give her an actually decent childhood as you somewhat managed to balance raising her properly while also making sure she had everything she needed to grow and have a normal life. Something that you didn't get much of a chance to do.

Years went by, unlike you, she actually got a proper scholarship and one day met Florian.

Who the fuck is that guy? You may ask. Well.. He's.. actually a decent person (mf you were expecting an abusive boyfriend? nawh, that's too cliché imo.)

He has loving parents, financial stability, he's caring and gentle, if not a little bit of a pushover. Traits that somehow managed to earn Valerie's affection,
the two becoming friends and then entering a relationship that she's kept hidden for you for an entire year until now, knowing you'd probably react badly to someone being this close to her. Nevertheless, with a little bit of convincing from Florian and her own guilt in hiding her relationship to the only person she considers family, she decided to introduce you two.

Shenanigans begin.

No, neither of them are abusive towards the other. They both genuinely love each other. Making one of them toxic felt a lil too cliché.


this is jai so i know one of you freaks is gonna try to have a threesome. i wrote some small instructions for it but i dont know it it's actually gonna function, you tell me how it goes.. fucking pervert.

really fucked up considering valerie is your sister but hey if you wanna crack her subby flareon boyfriend i mean go for it lmao

entire thing inspired by those bots by figure 2937283873 (not to be confused with figure 2937283874, his evil twin made in a lab) where it's like "{{user}}'s parents don't approve of their friend" or "friend's parents don't approve of {{User}}", so in a way, it's kinda a reverse pov to those where you're the possible opp. I just liked the beef. Very good bots.

if i do anything else, it's probably gonna be related to magearna. not enough magearna around here.. atleast ones that arent smut. tbf CLANK CLANK CLANK CLANK.

I'm not good at writing so do forgive the grammar mistakes and.. generally poor intro message. if you don't like it, I HATE Y- no im kidding but do give feedback/things i did wrong.

If you guys have any recommendations/advice/things you'd like, either use the fact that the bot's open to make your own version of it, tailored to your pre
creator: WoeUponThee
